prompt_area: #main-content > main > div.top-5.z-10.mx-auto.w-full.max-w-2xl > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > fieldset > div.relative > div > div.flex.flex-col.m-3.5.gap-3 > div:nth-child(1) > div.w-full.overflow-y-auto.font-large.break-words.transition-opacity.duration-200.max-h-96.min-h-[3rem].pl-[6px].pt-[6px].[&_ .is-editor-empty]:before:!content-['']
send_button: #main-content > main > div.top-5.z-10.mx-auto.w-full.max-w-2xl > div:nth-child(2) > div > div > fieldset > div.relative > div > div.flex.flex-col.m-3.5.gap-3 > div.relative.flex.gap-2.w-full.items-center > div.shrink-0.flex.items-center > div > div > button
response_area: #main-content > div > div.h-full.flex.flex-col.overflow-hidden.md:pt-[var(--df-header-h,0px)] > div > div > div > div.flex-1.flex.flex-col.px-4.max-w-3xl.mx-auto.w-full.pt-1 > div:nth-child(2) > div > div.contents > div > div > div > div > p
stop: #main-content > div > div.h-full.flex.flex-col.overflow-hidden.md:pt-[var(--df-header-h,0px)] > div > div > div > div.sticky.bottom-0.mx-auto.w-full.pt-6.z-[5] > div:nth-child(2) > fieldset > div.relative > div > div.flex.flex-col.m-3.5.gap-3 > div.relative.flex.gap-2.w-full.items-center > div.shrink-0.flex.items-center > div > button

login_detection.login_button_xpath: //button[contains(translate(normalize-space(.), 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ', 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'), 'log in') or contains(translate(normalize-space(.), 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ', 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'), 'sign in') or contains(translate(normalize-space(.), 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ', 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'), 'login')]
